channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Astronomers observe the birth of a magnetar for the first time
item.description: A strange chirping signal from a distant supernova has revealed the birth of a magnetar, confirming these magnetic neutron stars can form this way.

item.title: Scientists solve 30-year rye pollen mystery that may aid cancer research
item.description: Scientists have solved a nearly 30-year-old mystery about two unusual molecules in rye pollen that once showed an intriguing ability.

item.title: Engineers solve airflow mystery hidden nearly a mile underground
item.description: Engineers at a deep underground research facility observed that airflow sometimes reversed direction during major rainstorms.

item.title: Streetlights trap thousands of pill bugs in giant death spirals
item.description: Researchers found that artificial streetlights can trap thousands of woodlice in circular death spirals, a behavior not previously observed in the wild.
